subcodes.first_line: Say: Glorified art Thou, O Thou through Whom every lover hath hastened to the realm of the Best-Beloved and every seeker unto the abode of the Desired One [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قل سبحانک یا من بک سرع کل حبیب الی شطر المحبوب و کل قاصد الی مقر المقصود
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @knowledge; recognition of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
